title: n8n Social Media Auth & Posting Workflow
description: A ready-to-use n8n workflow template that handles OAuth authentication for multiple social platforms and enables users to post AI-generated images/videos without requiring app developers to store user credentials.
gumroad_description:
Storing user tokens in your database is a liability you don't need to take on.

This n8n workflow handles OAuth authentication across multiple social platforms and lets users post AI-generated images and videos directly — without your app ever touching their credentials.

Who this is for:
— Indie developers building AI content tools who don't want to become an OAuth expert
— No-code builders shipping social automation products for clients
— SaaS founders who need social posting functionality without the compliance headache

What's inside:
— 14-node workflow you can import and run in minutes, not days
— Multi-platform OAuth flow that keeps credentials with the user, not your server
— AI-generated image and video posting support built into the routing logic
— Step-by-step setup guide so you're not guessing at configuration

This saves you days of reading platform docs and debugging token refresh logic.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
